# git-spread v0.1.3

Initial public release of Git Spread.

## Highlights

- Propagate branches, commits, and pull requests across release, main, or maintenance branches.
- Run direct updates or create target pull requests for review.
- Use an interactive TUI to plan, run, monitor, continue, abort, and reset propagation runs.
- Resume paused runs after conflict resolution with persisted run state.
- Install with generated macOS, Linux, and Windows packages or portable archives.

## Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/liyown/git-spread/main/scripts/install.sh | VERSION=v0.1.3 sh
```
